description: This Dart source file defines a Flutter widget for an admin interface that allows creating or editing tales. It manages form input fields, loads existing tale data if editing, and saves the tale via a repository. The widget interacts with state, performs validation, and handles navigation upon completion.

classes.name: AdminTaleEditorScreen
classes.description: A stateful widget for creating or editing a tale, with form handling and data loading.

classes.name: _AdminTaleEditorScreenState
classes.description: The state class managing the form, data loading, and saving logic.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes the widget state and loads existing data if 'taleId' is provided.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of text controllers to free resources.

methods.name: _loadExisting
methods.description: Asynchronously loads existing tale data from the repository if editing an existing tale.

methods.name: _save
methods.description: Validates form data and saves the tale via the repository, handling creation or update as needed.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree, displaying form fields, validation errors, and navigation logic.
